claimText: The State of the Cryosphere Report 2025 is released by the International Cryosphere Climate Initiative.
evidenceExcerpt: Released by the International Cryosphere Climate Initiative.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the publishing organization of the report.

claimText: The power and industry sectors have the highest coverage in the State of the Cryosphere Report 2025.
evidenceExcerpt: Power and industry sectors have the highest coverage in the report.
examUse: Statement-based question on the sector-wise focus or coverage of the report.
